---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for MeedyaConverter
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address. Who would benefit from it, and in what scenarios?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or behavior you would like. Include any technical details, UI mockups, or workflow descriptions if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why they may not be sufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots that help illustrate the feature request.
